LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONERS BLAKE SEELEY, MASON INGRAN AND NICOLETTE TOUSSAINT'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS OFF CALENDAR AS TO DEPT. 302. THE MATTER SHOULD BE RE-SET IN DEPT. 501, THE REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING COURT. (SEE SFLR 8.10.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF HEARING FILED BY PETITIONER SEELEY, BLAKE INGRAN, MASON TOUSSAINT, NICOLETTE SERVED NOV-10-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO RESPONDENT FOLGER, ALEXANDRA
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-02-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $950.00 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE DEC-23-2014, FILED BY PETITIONER SEELEY, BLAKE INGRAN, MASON TOUSSAINT, NICOLETTE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PETITIONER BLAKE SEELEY, MASON INGRAN, NICOLETTE TOUSSAINT'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: R. GOULDING; DEPT.501; NOT REPORTED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER SEELEY, BLAKE INGRAN, MASON TOUSSAINT, NICOLETTE RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT FOLGER, ALEXANDRA $12,118.61 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,118.61, (SEE DETAILS IN THE SCANNED JUDGMENT)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WAS ENTERED ON DECEMBER 02, 2014

MINI MINUTES:
